benefits.description: Tennis elbow pain starting to feel better, was concerned about ability to continue gym training
Crushed PRs for almost every exercise over three heavy lifting sessions

side_effects.description: Sticking needle 14 times per week in tender inside of elbow area may become problematic over time

protocol_notes: Using 30g insulin needle. Injecting locally near inside of elbow twice daily. Using chip clip technique to pinch skin before injection. Considering rotating to outer elbow and shoulder area due to injection frequency. Has solid soreness in muscles but improved elbow pain.
